businessSummary.oneLiner: Government and enterprise AI data analytics leader with Gotham (defense), Foundry (enterprise), and AIP (AI platform)
businessSummary.description: Palantir builds AI data analytics platforms for government and enterprise. FY2025 revenue $4.48B (+60%). US commercial revenue surpassed $650M (Q4 +137% YoY). Pentagon designated Maven AI as official program of record for full military adoption. Selected for Golden Dome $185B missile defense software. Polymarket AI fraud prevention partnership expands into financial services. FY2026 guidance: $7.19B-$7.41B (+60-65%).
howTheyMakeMoney: Enterprise AI platform (Foundry) - Large enterprise data integration
AIP (AI Platform) - Generative AI integration platform
AIP Bootcamps - Short-term adoption programs driving customer conversion

keyMetrics.name: Trailing P/E
keyMetrics.interpretation: 7.4x the S&P 500 IT sector avg of 34x. Motley Fool: 'earnings need to grow 5x to bring P/E to 50x.' Extreme premium

keyMetrics.name: Forward P/E (FY2026E)
keyMetrics.interpretation: Based on FY2026 EPS estimate of $1.22. Still 3x the growth stock average of 30-40x

keyMetrics.name: Revenue Growth (FY2026E)
keyMetrics.interpretation: From FY2025 $4.48B to FY2026 $7.40B. AI defense demand driving growth acceleration

keyMetrics.name: P/S (Price-to-Sales)
keyMetrics.interpretation: 5-7x the software sector average of 10-15x. Still in overvalued territory relative to growth

keyMetrics.name: Market Cap
keyMetrics.interpretation: -31% from 52-week high of $207. Broad tech selloff impact

keyMetrics.name: RSI
keyMetrics.interpretation: Neutral zone. Room before oversold but weak bounce momentum in downtrend

growthDrivers.title: Motley Fool: 'Palantir blockbuster week' with 3 key developments (3/29)
growthDrivers.description: Golden Dome, Maven official adoption, Polymarket partnership named as 'blockbuster week's 3 key developments.' Fundamental strengthening continues

growthDrivers.title: Polymarket AI fraud prevention partnership (3/26)
growthDrivers.description: Palantir's Vergence AI monitors Polymarket trading and user behavior in real-time. Entry point into financial services expansion

growthDrivers.title: Golden Dome $185B missile defense software selection (3/25)
growthDrivers.description: Palantir and Anduril co-developing Trump administration's $185B Golden Dome missile defense system software. Phase 1 alone worth 'many billions'

growthDrivers.title: Czech National Bank buys PLTR (3/26)
growthDrivers.description: Czech central bank purchased 24,730 shares. Central bank buying an AI defense stock is a powerful institutional confidence signal

growthDrivers.title: Bain & Company global partnership expansion (3/26)
growthDrivers.description: Expanded partnership with Bain to accelerate global AIP and Foundry adoption via consulting channel

growthDrivers.title: Maven AI officially adopted by full US military (Program of Record, 3/23)
growthDrivers.description: Pentagon designated Maven Smart System as official program of record. Long-term adoption across all military branches confirmed

competitiveAdvantage.summary: 20+ years of government defense AI track record, top-level security clearances, Maven military adoption, combat-proven in Iran war. Moats money can't buy

moats.description: Ontology platform deeply integrated into government/military systems. Replacement costs are prohibitively high once deployed
Top-level security clearances and 20+ year government trust. Virtually impossible for new entrants to achieve equivalent access
Rapid customer acquisition via AIP Bootcamps and Ontology data model ecosystem expansion
Used in thousands of real-time strikes during the Iran war. Combat data is the ultimate competitive advantage

competitors.name: Anduril Industries
competitors.detail: Defense AI/drone startup. Collaborative partner on Golden Dome. $60B valuation

competitors.name: Snowflake / Databricks
competitors.detail: Enterprise data platform competition. Far behind Palantir in government/defense access

competitors.name: Microsoft / AWS
competitors.detail: Cloud giants entering government AI. Cannot match Ontology's depth of integration

competitors.name: C3.ai
competitors.detail: Enterprise AI platform. Significantly behind in both revenue and growth rate

recentNews.headline: Motley Fool: 'Palantir blockbuster week, 3 things shareholders should know'
recentNews.significance: Golden Dome, Maven, Polymarket named 'blockbuster' developments. Same outlet also published '2030 stock price same as today' bear case

recentNews.headline: Motley Fool: 'PLTR stock price in 2030 will be about the same as today'
recentNews.significance: P/E needs earnings to grow 5x (+489%) to reach 50x. Even at +65% annual growth, valuation normalization takes 5 years

recentNews.headline: PLTR -3% to $143.06, tech selloff continues
recentNews.significance: Third consecutive down day. Below 50-day ($149) and 200-day ($169). Weekly -5.1%

recentNews.headline: Polymarket and Vergence AI fraud prevention partnership
recentNews.significance: Vergence AI handles real-time Polymarket trading surveillance and fraud prevention. Beginning of financial services expansion

recentNews.headline: Golden Dome $185B missile defense software selection
recentNews.significance: Phase 1 alone worth 'many billions.' Significant long-term defense pipeline relative to FY2025 total revenue ($4.48B)

analystOpinions.notableComment: MarketBeat consensus $199 (+39%). Motley Fool acknowledges blockbuster week but also published '5-year same price' bear case. P/E 250x needs 5x earnings growth to justify

risks.title: Extreme valuation, '5-year same price' bear case
risks.description: P/E 250x (7.4x IT sector avg of 34x). Motley Fool: earnings need to grow 489% to bring P/E to 50x. Even at +65% annual growth, normalization takes 5 years

risks.title: Below both 50-day and 200-day SMAs
risks.description: Below 50-day ($149) and 200-day ($169). Three consecutive down days, weekly -5.1%. $126 support next

risks.title: Macro tech selloff risk
risks.description: Iran-Israel war, oil surge, No Kings protests. Most hostile environment for high-valuation tech stocks

risks.title: Analyst opinion split
risks.description: 17 Buy, 14 Hold, 5 Sell. Market skepticism on valuation persists

risks.title: Stock-based compensation dilution
risks.description: Share count growing 4.67% annually. Ongoing SBC diluting existing shareholder value

buyReasons.title: Blockbuster week: Golden Dome + Maven + Polymarket
buyReasons.rationale: Golden Dome $185B (Phase 1 'many billions'), Maven military adoption, Polymarket AI partnership. Three major developments in one week. Fundamentals at all-time best

buyReasons.title: Polymarket partnership opens financial services
buyReasons.rationale: Vergence AI for Polymarket fraud prevention is just the beginning. AI surveillance expansion across financial services

buyReasons.title: -31% from all-time high
buyReasons.rationale: Down from $207. Fundamentals are strongest ever with Golden Dome, Maven, Polymarket, yet price has declined

buyReasons.title: Trefis 50%+ rally catalyst analysis
buyReasons.rationale: Past major rally patterns match current catalysts (Golden Dome, Maven, commercial growth). Upside could be significant on reversal

overallOpinion: Motley Fool called last week a 'blockbuster.' Golden Dome $185B, Maven official adoption, Polymarket partnership. Same outlet also published '2030 price same as today.' P/E 250x requires 5x (+489%) earnings growth to justify
Polymarket Vergence AI partnership is a new growth axis. Starting from prediction market fraud prevention, it could expand across financial services. A concrete civilian AI use case beyond defense
Below 50-day ($149) and 200-day ($169). Iran war and protests pressuring high-valuation tech. Valuation is the core burden. P/S 76x is 5x software sector average
Consensus $199 (+39%). Down 31% from highs. Fundamentals are strongest ever but price needs time to catch up. Hold, small DCA only

investmentVerdict.summary: Blockbuster week (Golden Dome, Maven, Polymarket) makes fundamentals strongest ever, but P/E 250x demands 5x earnings growth. Motley Fool projects 'same price in 5 years.' Macro headwinds plus valuation burden. Small DCA possible but active buying is premature

threads.hook: PLTR: 'Blockbuster week' vs '5-year same price.' The paradox
threads.text:
$PLTR $143.06(-3.05%)

Motley Fool called it a blockbuster week. Golden Dome, Maven, Polymarket. Same outlet says '2030 price = today.' The P/E 250x paradox.

Polymarket Vergence AI opens financial services. Czech central bank bought. Fundamentals at all-time best.

But P/S 76x blocks the path. Consensus $199 (+39%). Hold, small DCA only.

witty.text:

'Blockbuster!' (Motley Fool)
'Same price in 2030.' (Also Motley Fool)

Same outlet, same day.
P/E 250x creates its own paradox.

The catalyst list is endless.

Conversation over.

+65% growth yearly for 5 years.

It just takes 5 years to catch up.

Convinced? Small position.
Not? Just watch. Hold.
